summary: iOS | Free 60 artwork missing, and update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest not working (Studio iOS or PTT)
scenario: Free 60 artwork missing after updating from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest version on Studio iOS or PTT, with DFU not possible due to low iPhone battery.
description_clean: Free 60 artwork missing. Update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest version not working on Studio iOS or PTT. DFU not possible due to low iPhone battery. No artwork displayed.
steps: 1. Start from version v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) on Studio iOS or PTT.
2. Attempt to update to the latest version.
3. Observe that the update does not work.
5. Observe that DFU is not possible due to low iPhone battery.
7. Observe that no artwork is displayed, specifically the 'Free 60 artwork' is missing.
expected: Update should complete successfully, DFU should be possible, and artwork (including Free 60 artwork) should be displayed.
actual: Update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) to latest version fails on Studio iOS or PTT. DFU not possible due to low iPhone battery. No artwork displayed; Free 60 artwork is missing.
